well isn't that nice.. greetings online friends
yes
i'm on team otto
kinda simple, but powerful
seems straightforward enough to me
maybe there’s landslides?
wonder if batman signed it
nope
damnit Craig
unhinged
thought that was mostly a deep-sea dweller
we've all done this
keepin it together
not feeling extremely patriotic this year tbh
hot apologies?
mmm hmm
sorry not sorry
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: An offering to Anxious Anarchy
item.description:
Let’s begin
Let’s overthrow
Let’s take back the mean of production
Let’s consume and be consumed
I’m full of rage
Or maybe just hungy
item.dc:creator: WonderOrWander

item.title: I Have A Son!
item.description:
Pardon the selfie...this is a big day for my family, and I can't really celebrate it with my "real" extended family, so I'm celebrating with my Imgur family. I'm fairly quite on here, but have found much love and support on the platform throughout the years. Long story short, I used to have a daughter and a son. Now I have two sons. I'm thrilled introduce you all to Auguste!
He came out to us (father, mother, brother) 6 months ago, and has been transitioning with us and his friends. He's just starting to transition more broadly, and today we made the announcement to the extended family. They're mostly very religious, and we do not expect it to go well. Our outlook is "hoping for the best, prepared for alternatives." Photo taken in my home office by my whiteboard, which Auggie has loved to write and draw on from a young age. His scrawls have been the topic of many meetings.
Since coming out, I've seen him come alive after multiple years of depression and anxiety. He's funny, smart, and an amazing artist. Most importantly, he's a kind, good person. He supports his friends and his family, and is always looking for ways to make someone's day better. It breaks my heart that those closest to him will likely not support him, as he's always been there for them.
This is Auguste at his first art show, earlier this year (April). He was invited to display some of his work at the local college (as a high school junior!). If you want to check out his amazing digital art and paintings, you can find him on instagram here: https://www.instagram.com/the_blueberrie_fairy/ You may notice a focus on F1, which is something we've bonded over this past year. He's a huge McLaren fan and I'm a Ferrari stan. Fred Vasseur, if you're reading this, get your head out of your ass!
As is the custom, I present to you one Harley tax. She is the goodest girl. P.S. - Auguste, I love you, and I am so proud of you. I know I tell you every day, but words aren't enough. I'm sorry that the world will likely never understand you, and that you will have to fight for your place more than others. But you've proven again and again that you're more than up for the challenge. Keep being you, no matter what the world says. And when they do say "stop that," look down from your mountain of success and say, "I can't hear you up here, you'll have to speak up." - Dad EDIT: I am overwhelmed by the outpouring of support and kindness everyone has shown. I shared the post and comments with Auguste and he was extremely moved. I love this community. Most Viral Edit: As this has now gone most viral, I'm going to wave to my brother (who introduced me to this platform many moons ago). He and his partner have been extremely supportive. Thanks dude, love ya!
item.dc:creator: humblewordsmith

item.title: Images of Note: very furry
item.description:
I for one welcome the return of the beardy wizard
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii streaming after 1830 UK time, we gonna try finish this painting.
can it breed with humans?
All hail Binky, benevolent kurdish leader of the Caliphate.
tag yourself
First JK, now Kid Rock.
I don't have weed tho.
Indeed a kitty
Hell yeah
Happy Disability pride month
Yeah that's basically it.
if you know, you know.
fuck Trump...so much
In the event of a nuclear bomb, this is how I wanna go out.
omg
HELL YEAH
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Unhinged meme dump that will surely entertain you ("The 300 000 points special")
item.description:
1. Mmm, salt
2. That's one way to propose, I suppose
3. She dances better with her eyes, than me with my entire body
4. What cigarette break looks like when you're a celebrity
5. Very important tutorial, you will need this in life, trust me!
6. Ladies and gentlemen, they got him
7
8. Cookies
9
10. He shooots and he scores
11. Crowd simulation
12. Starting adult life be like
13
14. Spring time
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Your Kung Fu is impressive, but can you beat my daughter?
item.dc:creator: RedCamaro

item.title: What a bitch.
item.description:
The president of the extremist Heritage Foundation, Kevin Bitch Roberts, is threatening the country as the leader of Project 2025, which is something out of a dystopian movie. Roberts, who is anti-LGBTQ, has openly stated that he saw Heritage's role as "institutionalizing Trumpism." In his recent ominous comments in a podcast, he says: "we are going to win. We're in the process of taking this country back..let me speak about the radical left. You and I have both been parts of faculties and faculty senates and understand that the left has taken over our institutions." "I come full circle on this response and just want to encourage you with some substance that we are in the process of the second American Revolution, which will remain bloodless if the left allows it to be."
..da fuck is that supposed to mean Kev? Crazy bitch.
For those who don't know what Project 2025 entails - many of you probably already know what it's about - this plan created by activist American conservative think tank the Heritage Foundation, intends to reshape the federal government in their image, in the event that a Republican wins the upcoming election. It literally states: “It is not enough for conservatives to win elections; we need both a governing agenda and the right people in place, ready to carry this agenda out on day one of the next conservative administration." Many contributors have close ties to Donald Trump and his campaign this year. This project seeks to fire all the career civil servants who won't swear absolute loyalty to Trump, and replace a tiny fraction with absolute Trump zealots. Here's just a few of their plans: -Slashing health care insurance -removing legal protections against discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity -To infuse the government with elements of fundamentalist Christianity -Shutting down access to safe abortions, contraception and other reproductive health care, putting women’s lives at risk -Dismantling the foundations of immigration policy, tearing families apart, turning away desperate refugees and stripping away protections for Dreamers -Deleting “sexual orientation and gender identity” from all federal rules, reinstating a transgender military ban and limiting LGBTQ workplace discrimination protections -Promotes capital punishment and the speedy "finality" of those sentences -Gut climate policy and boost fossil fuels could set back global efforts for decades, advocate for oil and gas and ignore greenhouse gas emissions (the think tank says: “to end the focus on the climate crisis and green subsidies”) And that's not all....evil fucking bitches..
item.dc:creator: RepairsGrowTails

item.title: Mēmê Dümp
item.description:
The news depresses me.
I don't really like Ben Affleck as an actor, he's not interesting or engaging to me, but man is he banging meme fodder.
Those who do not study history are doomed to repeat it, and education is culturally undervalued in this country.
Truth, TM
Get it right.
Why mess with a system that works?
Same with VPNs, or at least with mine. All of a sudden it won't work with Disney+ or Prime, then I update it and it works again.
Sneaky.
To avoid this, just run the name past one 13 year old boy.
DUN DUN.
Radiation is a phobia of mine, Chernobyl is terrifying to me, but this made me chuckle.
Kermit has reached his final Kaiju form!
Both.gif
There's always room for family.
I haven't yet given up this hard, but man I get it.
Doing it right.
Reaching across the divide to unite two fandoms. Beautiful.
Jesus needs to buy me dinner first.
That you think you can compete is adorable. Keep striving, champ.
This is right up there with The Fuckening.
I will not be shamed.
He calls you brother unironically.
Blessings upon you, so mote it be.
I'm super, thanks for asking.
It's true.
They need that tank hooked up to a mask.
I'm willing to pay my share, but assholes with more money than I will ever see refuse to pay theirs.
My ability to regulate my body temperature is shot, I am old, and it is currently 106 outside.
Not a great option, but it's an option.
The pills kind of work, so there's that.
They are hard to miss.
Pulling up from a nosedive is hard. Ask for help, no matter how embarrassing or painful it is. People love you.
<3 nom <3
Hehe, or What's New Pussycat 37 times in a row.
Actually this sounds like a painful way to go, so maybe not.
...what if?
As I said earlier, his memeiness seems almost purposeful.
It's me!
Fuck his head and the neck it rode in on.
Direct is good, I want to know what I'm getting into.
It's me, I am the weird aunt.
Fuck corporations. But yeah, I giggled.
Please?
Awwwww.
Release the frög!
I am dating myself here, but I laughed.
OH NO NIPPLES.
This guy is my artistic idol.
It's fucking hot, it's going to be over 100 for the next week and I hate it here.
Yup, goodnight. Maybe I'll post my Daily Sketch For Mental Health tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: DeVleermuis

item.title: A Terrified Peach Cobbler
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett I wanted to introduce you to someone incredibly special.
This is Cobbler, and Cobbler has had a tough life.
Cobbler was found as a stray in Oklahoma and never claimed We don't know what her 1 year of life was like before she was rescued, but after spending a few days with her I can tell you it wasn't good.
Last year I took in as many crisis fosters as I could, dogs coming out of really difficult situations So I'm no stranger to high anxiety dogs, even MrsPuckett was highly medicated when she first came home
But I've never met a dog as scared as Cobbler. Even the wind made her tail tuck between her legs and she was absolutely terrified of me
Healing Hearts Rescue saved Cobbler from euthanasia in Oklahoma and transported her to Minnesota On Monday she came to stay with me and my dogs fully equipped with a GPS tracker because she's such a flight risk.
The first night Cobbler spent under an end table in the far corner of my apartment shaking Everytime I stood up she bolted to the closet, anytime I got the leash out she started whimpering
I figured it would be good for her to work with MrsPuckett, a dog that overcame so many issues through exercise So the 3 of us started adventuring together on calm streets.
It didn't take long for Cobbler to start taking cues from Puckett Right away her anxiety went from 100 to 90, it was a good start
Her face and body start to loosen up with every mile
She started looking forward instead of constantly scanning for threats
She started standing a little taller.
AND LOOK AT MSCOBBLER NOW ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／
Cobbler has a long way to go but if she's done this well in the first 72 hours, I believe in her the entire way
For a dog like Cobbler it really takes a community I only have 7 days with her and in that time she's going to make an incredible amount of progress
After 7 days with The Pucketts she'll go back to her foster home and we'll start looking for a potential adopter One that has the time, energy and know-how to continue working with her like we are.
That's the incredible thing about dogs and humans We all reach different levels of being broken at different times, but things can always get better if we have support.
This has been a huge shift for me personally, going from working with privately funded shelters to a local rescue league Nashville Humane took in cute dogs that they knew would get adopted Healing Hearts Rescue takes in dogs that nobody else will give a second chance.
So to see Imgur raise over $5,000 for the rescue last week and Imgurians all over the world sending them items they desperately needed It really meant so much to me and I can't thank you enough for all the support.
I've never been so happy to hear a dog snore in my entire life. You're doing a wonderful job Cobbler Beans, everything is about to get better for you. ... If you'd like to send something to Healing Hearts to help them in saving dogs like Cobbler, check out their wishlist below https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT You can also donate directly to them and even $20 goes a long way when so many people are involved https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ ... Thank you for reading about Cobbler, I'll be back with more Nanna bridge trips soon!
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: A huge win (Follow up post) witha dump
item.description:
Okay so on one of my previous post I had talked about this happening since that time there was an issue and insurance didn't cover it at first even though they were going to. Then the doctor resubmitted it so now that we got it all sorted out and he had a call with me this morning. Everything is good to go and I'm kind of elated and awestruck because I wasn't expecting this to happen so soon.
I'm definitely going to get this as a tattoo one of these days.
You know I feel safe saying it here but my ears are literally just like Judy's, they are my biggest weakness and no one can take advantage of it cuz you don't know where I am. muhahahaha!
Pretty much
All the damn time.
I mean...
Hoping my bf sees this dump and this one specifically.
Umf, just give my collar a tug >\\\\>
This one someone posted not long ago and it was like an attack on me. XD
Really would love to get this as a tattoo as well.
I'm from Traverse City! Anyone else from Michigan? (I'm sure there are!) The damn yuppers all caused huge traffic issues for the cherry festival.
NGL this looks fun..
And this is partly why I am on my keto diet! I wanna steal the BFs shirts ^~^
Especially to all you people here. Y'all are mostly wonderful. :p
What kind of gun is that?
Yuuuup!!! I constantly have to ask people to repeat.
This goes for anyone, not just my alphabet mafia family o3o
Mhmm this is spot on!
Sallie May was confirmed to be canonically TransFem!
Helluva pride.
Don't mind me, just passing through.
Paying homage to @ElbowDeepInAHorse
Yes yes he is.
Right?
I really loved this little animation.
Fuck yes!
I mean..the bf says they are good.
I need each pair.
Uh idk how this one got in.
She is so cute!
I wish my degree counted.. DeVry University is junk apparently, and now my degree is practically worthless.
Uh..yeah this is definitely an attack. Someone posted it a few weeks ago and I stole it
Eeyup.
Not me.
This sounds like a vacation!
Nope not me, I never do.
Hah, I blew air out my nose when I first saw this.... On top of shooting bubbly water out the nose because I snorted laughing mid drink.
Mint gang here! Runs great on my old i3!
Sadly..I'm only getting one of these ATM. I'll let you guess which x3~
Mooooooooooooooood all the time!
This isn't really a meme but I found it at Walmart and wanted it for me. #poorpuppygirlproblems
Hey I like some pain, does that make me insane?
I found this years ago and it's been buried in my Google drive ever since and I found it again!
Stolen from here, like most of these images o3o But yeah, I figured I would update y'all and actually give it a shot at a meme dumperino.

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #164
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: The Sixteenthst, First Edition: Actually memes this time.
item.description:
I prefer Kawasaki tools. They run well, for what I typically need.
No. Bad. Don't shame people for having hobbies. Fucking stop that.
I love this one, partly because Shen seems to actually be a decent person, and not, you know, a nazi, like one of the other versions. There are so many better versions than that one. Sarah Andersen's version is one.
Profiling people targets neurodivergent people and people with mental illnesses, and anxiety. It's also very often racially motivated.
The bad guys from 1942 found out that torture didn't work. It's one of a few pieces or research from them that's actually good, and I hate that I have to acknowledge that.
I'd be a lot happier if I could shapeshift.
So is punk. Stop trying to strictly define either, and kick nazis out.
Hell yeah!
Internet Explorer wouldn't do this to me.
Men, women, shambling mounds that can give enthusiastic, informed consent. Doesn't matter. Though my attraction to men has always felt heteronormative and my attraction to women has always felt queer. Probably should have seen that as a sign, but I didn't know what I didn't know, so I'll give myself a little grace and a little love. I deserve that much.
I bet Jar Jar Binks is a lovely person in real life. Well, now that I think about it, he did kind of give Sheev the power to make the Empire. Ah well. We can't all be perfect.
Please. I need my lungs.
Me too, bud. Me too.
My dad made me feel that way. I've pulled some of them out now that he's gone.
Making fun of Lovecraft and his xenophobia is the only correct solution.
I love my cats.
I've been reading a gay smut book I got for free. It's pretty good so far.
Normalizing queer folks in traditional spaces is helpful. Rainbow capitalism provides visibility, and yes, it sucks, and yes it's about corporate greed, but good or bad, visibility is still visibility. It helps normalize people being in traditional spaces.
I love these two and their cute gay relationship.
Here I am making carbonara out of packet ramen, because it's what I have on hand.
God I love this show. I also love that all the anime bullshit can be explained as being from a child's perspective. Also, I think Yor might be AroAce, which is awesome.
This is why I can't do unpainted minis. I shake too much.
Let me be a hot plague doctor.
Please, just explain your reasoning, and why it works, and I'll be happy to do the work.
God forbid women do anything.
God forbid women have hobbies.
Sex work is real work. Union work is real work. Military work is real work. We respect (almost) all kinds of work boots(Not police. Never police.) in this house.
Asking for me. Please. I need to know.
My cats would shoot the ceiling. He does not have conflict resolution skills, and people who don't have that shouldn't have guns.
Leftist infighting is fucking stupid.
Yes. Yes they did.
BABY!
Yes. He's a narcissist, and an abuser. Same as Astarion. You cannot fix them. If they know what's good for them, they'll fix themselves, but they won't.
Just be kinder. It costs less than cruelty.
item.dc:creator: villainousdescent

item.title: Someone told me to get Sammy a cheeseburger for his last meal. So I got him 4.
item.description:
Yes this was his first cheeseburger. Great Danes are prone to bloating and colic, and Sammy especially so. I think his healthy diet is a huge reason he made it to 11.
He loved the first two so much I stopped for two more on the way to the euthanasia appointment. Rest in peace, I’ll always love you. Samwise Underfoot 5/26/2013-6/17/24. Edit: people are asking why I’d put down a “perfectly healthy seeming dog”. I assure you that Sam’s quality of life was extremely poor and this was the worst decision I’ve ever had to make. and I made it with the support of family, friends and professional veterinarians. You can’t tell his health from two 20 second clips of him enjoying his last burgers. I’d appreciate if you are questioning me to just delve into the comments instead of asking. thank you.
item.dc:creator: feryooday

item.title: My job sucks
item.description: I'm poor and hungry. I can get a free lunch if my store gets 10x 5 star google reviews, National Storage Redwood New Zealand. Not a bot, just a hungry boi
